analysisTarget: TDD Test Coverage Gaps That Allowed Agent Pages Race Condition Failure

currentTestSuite.approach: London School TDD with comprehensive mocking

criticalGaps.description: No tests for component behavior during specific time windows
Missing tests for all combinations of loading/data/error states
No tests for useEffect hook execution sequence with dependencies
Missing tests for state flow between AgentDynamicPageWrapper and AgentDynamicPage

moderateGaps.description: Incomplete testing of conditional rendering with various state combinations
Limited testing of different API response timing patterns
No tests for error boundary behavior during async operations

unteststedScenarios.scenario: Component receives initialPageId but pages array is empty during API loading
unteststedScenarios.expectedBehavior: Shows loading state until API completes
unteststedScenarios.testPattern: Mock API with controlled timing, assert loading state during window

unteststedScenarios.scenario: useEffect with [initialPageId, pages, loading] fires multiple times during state transitions
unteststedScenarios.testPattern: Track useEffect executions, verify state completeness

unteststedScenarios.scenario: Concurrent API calls (agent + pages) complete at different times
unteststedScenarios.testPattern: Mock APIs with different delays, verify isolated loading states

unteststedScenarios.scenario: Boolean condition (pages.length === 0 && !loading) evaluates during async window
unteststedScenarios.testPattern: Snapshot test condition evaluation at T+50ms, T+100ms, T+200ms

testingChallenges.improvedApproach: Jest fake timers + controlled Promise resolution
State machine testing with transition verification
testingChallenges.implementation: Custom test utilities for state transition tracking
Render parent-child components together with shared state

implementation.setup: Jest fake timers + manual Promise control
implementation.verification: Assert component state at each interval

implementation.execution: Test each combination with different inputs
implementation.verification: Assert correct rendering for each state

implementation.setup: Track useEffect executions with spy functions
implementation.execution: Trigger state changes and monitor execution order
implementation.verification: Assert correct execution sequence and timing
implementation.example: test('useEffect executes after data load, not before')

implementation.setup: Render complete component hierarchy with real router
implementation.execution: Simulate user navigation and API responses
implementation.example: test('user navigates to page URL and sees content')

userFlows: User clicks agent link -> sees agent overview
User navigates to specific page URL -> sees page content
User navigates to non-existent page -> sees appropriate error
User navigates during slow network -> sees loading states

mockingStrategies.apiMocking: Mock fetch with controllable timing and responses
mockingStrategies.routerMocking: Mock useParams with various URL scenarios
mockingStrategies.stateMocking: Mock component state at specific transition points

redPhase.current: Write failing test for expected behavior
redPhase.improved: Write failing test matrix for all state/timing combinations

greenPhase.current: Implement minimal code to pass test
greenPhase.improved: Implement with async-aware patterns from start
additions: Include error boundaries for async operations

refactorPhase.current: Clean up code while maintaining test passes
refactorPhase.improved: Refactor for async reliability and maintainability
additions: Extract reusable async state management hooks
Implement state machines for complex flows
Add performance optimizations for async operations
Enhance error handling and recovery patterns

beforeImplementation: Design test matrix for all async state combinations
duringImplementation: Write timing tests before implementing async logic
Test API integration with various response scenarios
afterImplementation: Run comprehensive async state test suite
Verify performance under various network conditions
Test error recovery and edge cases
Document async behavior patterns for future reference

testingFramework.async: React Testing Library with user-centric approach
testingFramework.timing: Jest fake timers for controlled timing

mockingLibraries.api: MSW (Mock Service Worker) for realistic API mocking

testingUtilities.asyncTesting: Custom utilities for async component testing
testingUtilities.visualTesting: Chromatic or similar for visual regression

forTddPractitioners: Always test timing-dependent behavior with controlled scenarios
Create comprehensive state transition test matrices
Use realistic mocking that exposes real-world timing issues
forReactDevelopers: Test async state management patterns extensively
Verify conditional rendering logic with all state combinations
Test useEffect behavior with various dependency scenarios
Test component integration with realistic data flows
forSystemArchitects: Design systems with testable async boundaries
Plan for timing-dependent behavior from architecture phase
Include async reliability patterns in design standards
Establish testing standards for async component interactions

preventionEffectiveness.target: 95% reduction in async state management failures
preventionEffectiveness.measurement: Failure rate in production vs test coverage
preventionEffectiveness.feedback: User reported issues and developer debugging time
